1718360.name: OMSI 2 Add-on Downloadpack Vol. 11 – KI-Elektroautos
1718360.description:
Electric cars - it is impossible to imagine today's streets without them, they will be present more and more often in the future and with the OMSI 2 Downloadpack Vol. 11 they can now also be seen on the OMSI maps.

The 11th part of the OMSI Downloadpack series is now dedicated to these vehicles and offers 9 different models from well-known manufacturers.

From small cars to sports sedans and SUVs, everything is included. In addition to models that are now frequently encountered, there are also some that are not visible in road traffic on a daily basis.

All models have in common that they are 3D-optimised and put as little strain as possible on OMSI. In addition to different colours, they also include the sound familiar from electric cars.

With the OMSI 2 Downloadpack Vol. 11, OMSI moves with the times and shows the electric vehicles of the 2020s.

Models included
  • Audi e-tron GT
  • Dacia Spring
  • Fiat 500
  • MB EQC
  • Nissan Leaf ZE1
  • Peugeot e-208
  • Polestar 1
  • VW ID.3
  • VW ID.4

Features

  • 9 different AI electric cars
  • Vehicle types from well-known manufacturers
  • Different colour variants
  • Static models to place on maps
  • Own, special sounds
  • Performance-optimised 3D models
1718360.supported_languages:
英语, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
